---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Call endpoint '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **.NET SDK version:** [e.g. 9.0.101] (run `dotnet --version`)
- **SecureTenant version / commit:** [e.g. v1.0.0 or commit SHA]
- **Database provider:** [e.g. SQLite, SQL Server]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as relevant configuration snippets or logs.
